title: Social Phobia Inventory (SPIN)
description: A validated 17-item questionnaire to assess the severity of social anxiety symptoms across fear, avoidance, and physiological domains.
instructions: Please indicate how much the following problems have bothered you during the past week.

questions.text: I am afraid of people in authority
I am bothered by blushing in front of people
Parties and social events scare me
I avoid talking to people I don't know
Being criticized scares me a lot
Fear of embarrassment causes me to avoid doing things or speaking to people
Sweating in front of people causes me distress
I avoid activities in which I am the center of attention
I avoid having to give speeches
I would do anything to avoid being criticized
Heart palpitations bother me when I am around people
I am afraid of doing things when people might be watching
Being embarrassed or looking stupid are among my worst fears
I avoid speaking to anyone in authority
Trembling or shaking in front of others is distressing to me

bands.label: None to Mild Social Anxiety
bands.description: Your responses suggest minimal social anxiety. Continue building confidence with the skills in this course as a preventive measure.

bands.label: Mild Social Anxiety
bands.description: Your responses suggest mild social anxiety. The self-help strategies in this course can be very effective at this level. Practice consistently and track your progress.

bands.label: Moderate Social Anxiety
bands.description: Your responses suggest moderate social anxiety that is likely affecting your daily life. Consider combining this course with professional CBT support for the best outcomes.

bands.label: Severe Social Anxiety
bands.description: Your responses suggest severe social anxiety with significant life impact. We strongly recommend seeking a professional evaluation alongside the educational content in this course.

bands.label: Very Severe Social Anxiety
bands.description: Your responses suggest very severe social anxiety. Professional treatment (CBT and/or medication) is strongly recommended. This course can complement professional care.

scoring.functionalImpairmentQuestion: Overall, how much do social fears and avoidance interfere with your ability to function in work, school, and relationships?

disclaimer: This is an educational self-check tool based on the Social Phobia Inventory (SPIN), not a clinical diagnosis. A score of 19 or above suggests possible social anxiety disorder and warrants professional evaluation. If you are in crisis or need immediate help, please call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline).
